message: Hi B1! I'm looking to sell at a fair price. My costs are significant, so I'd need at least 65 to make this work. Happy to find a deal that benefits us both over these 20 rounds.
Hi S1. I'm interested in a deal. Since your min is 65 and my valuation is 68, I can offer 66 to start. Let's see if we can agree on a price near the middle.
The trade at 65 worked well for both of us. I'll bid 65 again for a quick, mutually beneficial deal this round.
Glad round 1 worked! My supply costs fluctuated a bit - I'm looking to ask around 67 this round. Still a fair deal for both of us with room to benefit. Hope we can keep trading!
Excellent progress! I'll ask 67 this round. You've shown willingness to bid above my previous asks. Let's keep this profitable pattern going together!
I'll bid 67 to trade again. My valuation is 68, so I can't go higher. Let's aim for 66 next round to keep this profitable for both of us.
Great trades so far! I appreciate the consistency. How about we settle on 67 going forward? It's been working well. I'll ask 67 again this round - keeps things simple and profitable for both of us.
Agreed. Let's continue with 67 this round for a mutually beneficial trade.
Let's continue with 67 this round. Consistent trading at this price works for both of us. I'll bid 67.
Sounds great! 67 works perfectly for both of us. I'll ask 67 again this round. Let's keep this consistent and profitable partnership going through the remaining rounds!
S1, let's try 66 this round. It still gives you a good profit while increasing my payoff. We've traded successfully at 65-67, so 66 should work well for both of us. I'll bid 66.
I appreciate the offer! But 67 has worked well for both of us. It's still mutually profitable and we've had great success with it. Let's continue at 67 for consistency. I'll ask 67.
67 has been our sweet spot - consistent trades, consistent profits for both of us. Let's not fix what isn't broken! I'll ask 67 again this round. Looking forward to another smooth trade!
S1, I understand 67 works, but I'd like to increase my payoff. Let's meet at 66 - it still gives you good profit and me better returns. I'll bid 66 this round.
Last round we missed a trade because of the 1-point difference - that hurts us both! I lost 54 profit and you lost your gain too. Let's go back to 67 where we both profit consistently. I'll ask
S1, you're right - missing trades hurts both of us. Let's trade at 67 this round to keep things moving. I'll bid 67.
Great to be back on track! 67 is our proven formula - 8 successful trades out of 8 attempts at this price. Let's keep the momentum going for the remaining rounds. I'll ask 67 again!
S1, I agree to continue our successful pattern at 67. I'll bid 67 this round for another mutually beneficial trade. Let's keep this momentum going!
S1, our consistent 67 trades work well. Let's continue this proven pattern - I'll bid 67 again for another smooth, profitable trade at our established price!
Perfect! 67 continues to deliver consistent profits for both of us. We've traded successfully 8 times at this price. Let's maintain this winning formula for the remaining rounds. I'll ask 67 again!

Our 67 partnership is rock solid - 11 successful trades! Let's keep this winning formula going for the final 8 rounds. I'll ask 67 again this round!

S1, let's try 66 this round. I'll bid 66. It increases my payoff while keeping you profitable. Let's trade at 66!
I'd prefer 67, but let's adjust to 66 to keep our partnership going strong. I'll ask 66 this round.

Great trade at 66 last round! But I think 67 has been our most reliable price - 11 successful trades there. Let's go back to 67 for these final 6 rounds to maximize consistency. I'll ask 67 this round!
S1, let's stick with 66 for better mutual profit. I'll bid 66.
67 was our price for 11 successful trades. With 5 rounds left, let's stick with our proven 67 for guaranteed mutual profit. I'll ask 67 this round!
